task: Advanced high-value task: Cfd Surrogate Validation Sample Compliance Evidence Extract. Scenario: a platform owner wants to convert ambiguous measurements into deterministic review actions for cfd surrogate validation sample. Embedded packet: Records: R1 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=54 surrogate_drop_kPa=86 porosity_pct=1; R2 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=63 surrogate_drop_kPa=82 porosity_pct=4; R3 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=49 surrogate_drop_kPa=97 porosity_pct=0. Remediation options: O1 changes CFD_pressure_drop_kPa by -12% cost=83000; O2 changes surrogate_drop_kPa by -18% cost=99400; O3 changes porosity_pct by -25% cost=58600; max_budget=124800. Rules and constraints: absolute percent error>15% fails; porosity<40 may be outside support; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: perform a sensitivity check around the governing threshold and identify records whose classification is unstable. Deliver CFD_surrogate_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
